title: Craftable Cobweb
description: It is a datapack which helps you to craft the Cobwebs
body:
Cobweb Crafting Datapack for Minecraft 1.21

This datapack allows you to craft cobwebs in a survival-friendly way using string. No need for silk touch tools or creative mode—create cobwebs directly through crafting!

Features:
Crafting Recipe: Place 5 strings in an "X" pattern in the crafting grid to produce 1 cobweb. (See the included recipe image for reference.)
Survival-Friendly: Balanced to fit naturally into survival gameplay.
Vanilla-Friendly: Maintains the vanilla Minecraft feel while enhancing crafting options.
Compatibility:
Version: Minecraft Java Edition 1.21+
Multiplayer Support: Fully compatible with multiplayer worlds.
Datapack-Friendly: Works alongside other datapacks and vanilla features.
This datapack is perfect for builders, redstone engineers, and adventurers who want an easier way to obtain cobwebs for decoration, traps, or creative builds. Enhance your survival experience without breaking the game’s balance!
